# Préambule

{{< include "_slides/_01/_objectifs.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_01/_preparation.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_01/_exploratoire.qmd" >}}

# Concepts et Préparation

{{< include "_slides/_02/_intro.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_02/_nettoyage.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_02/_traitement.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_02/_reduction.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_02/_types.qmd" >}}

# Supervisé

{{< include "_slides/_03/_knn.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_03/_trees.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_03/_logistique.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_03/_linear.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_03/_forests.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_03/_svm.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_03/_ensemble.qmd" >}}

# Non-Supervisé

{{< include "_slides/_04/_kmeans.qmd" >}}

# Réseaux de Neurones

{{< include "_slides/_05/_perceptron.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_05/_mlp.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_05/_pinns.qmd" >}}

# Appendix

{{< include "_slides/_appendix/_orange.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_appendix/_jamovi.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_appendix/_git.qmd" >}}
{{< include "_slides/_appendix/_references.qmd" >}}
